network_summary: Dr. Joseph Fornal, DDS, FAGD (UIC 1989) and his partner Dr. Ivone Arellano Beron, DDS, MS co-own and operate a three-location private dental group in Chicagoland: Fullerton Family Dentistry (Chicago 60639), Aurora Dental Care (Aurora 60505), and West Chicago Dental Care (West Chicago 60185). The group website myfirstdentalvisit.com explicitly describes both doctors as 'partners who expanded from their original Chicago location to serve the DuPage and Kane County areas.' No MSO, management-services entity, DSO brand, or PE sponsor was identified. This is a classic two-dentist private multi-office group.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Joseph Fornal, DDS, FAGD (authorized official, general dentist, UIC College of Dentistry 1989, FAGD, member ADA/ISDS/CDS/AGD); co-partner Dr. Ivone Arellano Beron, DDS, MS (pediatric-trained but practices in a family/general context at these locations)
brand_trade_names: Aurora and West Chicago Dental Care
legal_entities: WEST CHICAGO DENTAL CARE, LTD (EIN 202073978, NPI 1750591723)
durable_artifacts: Shared authorized official JOSEPH FORNAL across all three NPPES organization NPIs (1750591723, 1780855676, 1649480138)
Group website myfirstdentalvisit.com lists all three locations under one practice network with both Fornal and Arellano Beron as partners
WebMD practice listing 'Aurora and West Chicago Dental Care' groups both doctors at 166 W Washington St West Chicago
Yahoo Local lists practice as 'Fornal, Joseph - Aurora and West Chicago Dental Care'
Northwestern Medicine provider profile lists Dr. Fornal at 'West Chicago Dental Care'
Three distinct LTD legal entities registered across three ZIPs (60185, 60505, 60639)
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Aurora Dental Care, LTD (location_id 80319c2b8ee5d471, NPI 1780855676) shows year_established=2024 and provider_count=0 in NPPES — this is a recently registered LTD entity with no individual providers yet listed. It may be a new satellite shell or a restructured entity; the practice may not yet be fully operational as a standalone location. Recommend verifying whether 195 Eastern Ave Aurora IL 60505 is an active clinic.
evidence_chain: AO signal: JOSEPH FORNAL appears as authorized official on three NPPES organization NPIs (reach=3) across ZIPs 60185, 60505, 60639. Documentary corroboration: (1) myfirstdentalvisit.com/meet-the-team explicitly identifies Dr. Joseph Fornal DDS FAGD and Dr. Ivone Arellano Beron DDS MS as partners who founded Fullerton Family Dentistry in Chicago then expanded to open Aurora Dental Care (195 Eastern Ave, Aurora 60505) and West Chicago Dental Care (166 W Washington St, West Chicago 60185); (2) WebMD practice listing groups both doctors under 'Aurora and West Chicago Dental Care'; (3) Northwestern Medicine provider profile lists Fornal at West Chicago Dental Care; (4) ADA Find-a-Dentist, Healthgrades, Yahoo Local, and Yelp all corroborate Fornal at the West Chicago address. No DSO brand, MSO, management-services agreement, or PE sponsor found in any source.
future_app_notes: Verify whether Aurora Dental Care LTD (60505) is an active operating clinic — NPPES shows 0 providers and year_established=2024, suggesting it may be a new or paper entity. If confirmed active, this is a clean dentist_multi ready_for_validation. Dr. Arellano Beron has pediatric specialty training but the network practices as family/general — no specialist-exclusion applies. Watch for any future MSO formation if the group continues to expand.
